overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a character with red hair exploring a grand castle interior. The character ascends a staircase into a blue-walled common room with high ceilings, interacts with a cat, and continues up through darker corridors into an astronomy tower featuring a celestial orrery and starry ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase ascending to blue-walled hall

events.description: character emerges from lower stairwell into the high-ceilinged main hall with blue walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the grand wooden staircase toward the upper hall

notable_agents.action: two figures standing silhouetted against the large window at the top of the stairs

entered.detail: wide wooden staircase with ornate railings ascending through the center of the frame
large stone wall with engraved text in gold lettering
tall walls painted deep blue with wooden paneling and gold trim
framed portraits hanging on the blue walls in gold frames
tall arched window with intricate tracery at the end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand wooden staircase flanked by an inscribed stone wall. As they climb, the space opens into a high-ceilinged hall with deep blue paneled walls adorned with portraits, illuminated by natural light streaming through a large gothic window at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room with circular seating and large rose window

events.description: character kneels down to pet a calico cat on the wooden floor
character stands up and continues walking as the cat follows behind

agents.ego_description: kneeling to pet a calico cat near a stack of books, then walking through the hall as the cat follows

notable_agents.action: calico cat being petted then following the character through the hall

entered.detail: circular stained glass window with intricate petal design allowing bright light to enter
large round blue carpet with gold patterns defining the central seating area
round wooden tables with chairs where students are seated
large antique terrestrial globe on a wooden stand
tall piles of books stacked on the floor beside the globe

segments.scene_description: After a brief cut, the character interacts with a calico cat in a spacious common room featuring a large circular rose window. The room has a blue circular rug, wooden tables where students sit, and a large globe surrounded by book stacks. The character pets the cat and walks through the space as the cat follows.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase leading to upper tower levels

events.description: character exits the main hall through a side archway and begins ascending a narrower staircase
lighting becomes significantly darker as character enters the stone corridor section

agents.ego_description: walking up the side staircase away from the main hall, passing other students descending

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking down the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: curved wooden staircase with ornate banister leading upward
gothic stone arch marking the transition to the upper levels
light-colored stone block walls replacing the blue paneling

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the main hall through a side archway and ascends a narrower wooden staircase. The environment transitions from the blue-paneled common room to beige stone walls with tall windows, becoming progressively darker as they climb toward the upper tower levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: astronomy tower with celestial orrery and starry ceiling

events.description: character enters the astronomy tower room containing the large blue celestial orrery
camera tilts up to reveal the magical starry ceiling with swirling nebula effects

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark astronomy tower and ascending the spiral staircase toward the starry ceiling

entered.detail: large glowing blue celestial globe with brass rings and armillary sphere structure on a wooden table
wooden spiral staircase winding upward around the tower walls
magical ceiling depicting a night sky with stars and nebula clouds
circular wooden table holding the celestial orrery and scattered scrolls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark doorway into the astronomy tower, revealing a room with a large glowing blue celestial orrery on a central table. They ascend a spiral wooden staircase as the camera reveals a magical starry ceiling above, creating an atmosphere of mystical observation and discovery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a bright, blue-paneled common room into the mystical, starlit heights of an astronomy tower. It begins as the character ascends a grand wooden staircase beside an inscribed stone wall, moving into a high-ceilinged hall illuminated by natural light from a large gothic window. The scene then expands into a spacious common room where the character pets a calico cat amidst book stacks and a large globe before exiting through a side archway. As the character climbs a narrower wooden staircase, the environment shifts from deep blue panels to beige stone walls, with the lighting becoming progressively darker. Finally, the camera passes through a dark doorway to reveal a glowing blue celestial orrery and a spiral staircase leading up toward a magical starry ceiling.
